items.flavor: Oh! Alright well, guess I’m here.
It’s fine, I’m average at best.
I’m pretty good, for a 1 blood.
You know…somebody once told me…
Just trust me, I’m an engineer.
Naught but a corpse, left to rot.
Poor creature, how it has suffered.
Wow, great draw!
They lived together, they died together.
A little invesment goes a long way.
You are allowed to keep it.
Grotesque boils, ready to burst.
Even the lowliest of spirits have use.
It is eternal. Everpresent. Unyielding.
A frail and spooky mass of bones.
A monstrous force of ivory.
Its’ Labyrinth became its’ tomb.
A once proud mage, left to rot.
An apt reflection of those around it.
Forced to harvest, as long as it stands.`
Traps an evil on the verge of escape.
A bring of death, a renderer of flesh.
Always in need of bloody sacrifice.
A common vessel, for spirits.
An inseparable pair, fit for a king.
A bloodsucking prowler of the night.
Back from the grave, if only breifly.
Consuming whatever carrion it can find.
A monster in life, a monster in death.
Forever regrowing its own tissue.
Ever Imposing, this wall of meat.
Contains naught but secrets and fear.
Ever emboldening their undead horde.
Words cannot describe this…creature.
They search for knowledge beyond life.
Striking fear into all who see him.
His broken body sways in the breeze.
Willing to dig what needs to be dug.
They just want to find their own grave.
A spooky visage in wood.
A scavenger of flesh and blood.
Fully staffed and ready to plunder.
A corpse left rotten and deformed.
Protecting the mausoleum, by force.
Sewn together, friends forever.
A shame, no one present to save them.
Frozen in time, waiting for freedom.
An unfortunate pile of meat and thought.
Not all there, but it carries a boon.
Locked away, and for good reason.
A corpse within a corpse.
Ever loyal, even beyond the grave
Oh cool, it’s me. great.
Some are forced to scavenge the graves.
This is a rather…interesting boon.
A mass of marrow and carrion.
Rather happy, despite the crying.
Welp, guess it’s my turn.
Cobbled together from skin and bone.
A fine pelt, sure to be worth trading.
Oh man, this can’t be right.
A marker of those once passed.
Nothing more than the remains of a tree.
What an odd use…
The trapper and his…interesting gadgets.
What has happened to these creatures?
What…horrific necromancy is this?
This mage…what magick did this?
Did his incessant digging cause this?
Everything about this power is…wrong.
This beast did not deserve this fate.
Woe unto the beasts living here.
This machine…this is all wrong.
Your patronage is valued highly.
Perhaps she will trade scraps for this.
Let’s make a deal…
Not all graves are left to lie.
What’d they do to rocky?
Poor master…what happened to you?
A beeper, perhaps.
Very few escape its metal teeth.
Guess he saw me as a friend too.
I’m fine…more than I can say for them.
Stop playing, natychmiast!
A towering monument of nature.
Now this… this will fetch something nice.
He finally struck gold, did he?
What a quaint little home.
Not quite the unknown I was expecting.
Ever the favorite of the trapper.
I’m a cook, not a card.
Locked away, for fear of their intent.
Not all birds are destined to fly.
The angler uses curious bait, to be sure.
For a boulder, it is quite nice.
It is just happy to be here, admittedly.
I’m not the only one who has hidden wisdom.
A violent bot of claws and bullets.
Keep their wires from getting tangled.
Once a fighter, always a fighter.
Assassin droid, brutally efficient.
Easy to aim, easy to shoot.
One photo to capture the rest of your life.
Surprisingly sturdy, given its size.
Shoots anything that gets close.
Assassin droid, quick and clean.
An ornery little tin can.
It shoots on command, without hesitation.
Transfers power, but not much else.
What a horrid construct…
A bombshell, through and through
Oddly, mox makes for a good processor.
Its grimy, but the gems work regardless.
Strange enough, mox increase memory.
Funnily, mox makes more efficient hardware.
We are- I am, a good card.
A… Curious bot indeed.
Strong springs for jumping into problems.
A vicious and twisted metal construct.
I suppose your deck is adequate.
It’s odd for rust to smell this bad.
The buzz of its flight, irritating.
Built for one singular function.
A Behemoth bot, a terror of tech.
Sometimes they need to get repaired.
What could it be hiding from you?
Push your luck, what could go wrong.
Admittedly, it isn’t much to look at.
Even in battle, the line does not stop.
Careful, a bump could set it off.
A frail patchwork of parts.
Infinite Power at your fingertips.
Full of energy, but they cannot use it.
Careful, the glass is thin.
Oy lookit, im somefin’ of a card.
Twice the guns, twice the power.
Jumps High, has fun, just a cool guy.
A metal blight upon the skies.
Works deep, even below the dredger.
Be careful, or it will do it.
Provides a violent shock to the system.
Sometimes they need a little extra juice.
A vicious and protective bucket of bolts.
The most basic in function and form.
A scuttling little worker machine.
Adapts and reforms as needed.
A meddlesome little drone.
On the move, searching for something.
Sees all it can, where it can.
Can push themselves beyond their limits.
An easy exam, all things considered.
Adept at casting from a distance.
Ideally, you will play me well.
They see the future, but not much else.
ARRRGHH! I’ll try my best!
A conduit for sapphire magicks.
A hulking construct driven by mox.
A conduit for ruby magicks.
This one never quite felt like itself.
A powerful conduit for all magicks.
An ancient monument to old magicks.
Nothing spectacular…but entertaining.
Good for getting hit, but not much else.
With practice, even mox have potential.
Even mages see the value of energy.
Just loves to push people around.
A curious sight, a mox gained form.
A pure reflection of one’s flaws.
What a cute little spellcaster!
Their exam came quite naturally.
Fight or flight? why, both are ideal.
Admittedly, more brute than wizard.
The master of creation, a life for a life.
New to magic, but excited regardless.
Ever stalwart in the face of challenge.
They were locked away for heresy.
Lead astray by falsities and sacrifices.
A mox powered energy producer.
YES! PLAY ME! STIMULATE ME!
Young of age, but full of knowledge.
Sworn to protect, for all eternity.
The body drives, the mox maintains.
For those pupils who get out of line.
Flight is challenging but useful.
They’re powered directly by gems.
For they see all, as it is bare before them.
Engorged, driven by only hunger.
Created by goranj to empower their body.
Ravenous, driven mad by the gems.
Repelling even the greatest of assaults.
Protective of what fuels their magic.
Perfect mox meets immaculate form.
Powerful magick in a fleeting form.
Small magick from a small form.
They are always losing their research.
Not one for working alone.
A conduit for emerald magicks.
This ones’ exam was quite twisted.
Their exam was masterfully crafted.
A wonderous friend to frog kind.
Creation is a powerful tool.
Created by bleene to focus their mind.
An ever loyal magic companion.
Weak alone, but overwhelming in force.
A feathered percussionist, a loud pest.
A vicious beast, bathed in blood.
An ambitious predator, needing only time.
‘Tis a game O` chance, heeee-haaw!
A proud, and vicious, contender.
A ravenous beast with insatiable hunger.
Little can stop this rampaging brute.
A bountiful pit of hares.
This level of brutality needs no words.
Always lethal, the caustic adder.
A horrid tyrant upon the skies.
But a minor problem…if not ignored.
What a powerful presence.
Small, frail, pathetic, at least, for now.
Careful now, use me wisely.
I’ve not seen this chrysalis before…
Yep, its me. Nice topdeck.
A lowly, but ever noble creature.
A largely… unimpressive specimen.
Salutations, a lucky draw.
An odd, almost unnatural behavior.
Meek and feeble, yes. but ever so useful.
A horrid stench to keep predators away.
Expectedly slippery, surprisingly strong.
Careful, Just a touch can be deadly.
Stalwart in the face of adversity.
Elusive, but not very menacing.
Resoundingly pointless, with little use.
They all go for it, every time.
A sanguine beast, doused in blood.
No less conniving in incubation.
Horribly clever, this blight of a bird is.
Brittle, if you can survive its bite.
Tragic royalty, destined to crumple.
A cute, if not scrappy, little gatherer.
What purpose could it serve?
Oddly sadistic, this venerable beast.
An ornery, and ever annoying rodent.
Small, frail, but ever so useful.
A feasting, bloodthirsty school.
A prudent rat bearing trinkets.
Defenseless, but very well stocked.
Flightless yes, but mobile despite it.
Oops I gave him a gun oh no.
Resourceful, weak, but endearing.
A little one in an adamantine shell.
A portent of death and destruction.
A towering, and ever powerful beast.
An unyielding, ultimate defense.
Blind, but seemingly omnipresent.
Curious…
Yet another turn of the skinning knife…
A perfect incarnation of terror.
A slight incarnation of terror.
A Collector of trinkets and trash alike.
A horrific bird with a peculiar diet.
A swift, slippery hunter.
Its true appearance is…horrifying.
He just a lil’ guy just a lil’ guy.
An imposing sight, this beast of myth.
Vicious in appearance, frail in nature.
A hellacious beast with a peculiar diet.
A violently efficient bird of prey.
Strange…
Its form speaks enough of its efficacy.
Go Fish.
They’re just looking for love.
Uninspiring, but charming despite it all.
Nature is cold and unforgiving.
Where one is, another is not far behind.
A pest alone, but devastating in swarm.
Young, ambitious, and scared.
Hearty form, but flighty nature.
Quite strong, despite its meager size.
Sharpens its’ teeth om scrounged bones.
An unrelenting, terrifying canine.
Unfortunately, not all eggs hatch.
An aggressive, water dwelling reptile.
A Meager, but dangerous, scavenger.
Always inevitable, emerging from death.
You play. I fish.
An immortal, persistent nuisance.
Its incessant buzz could drive one insane.
Left abandoned, cursed, and hungry.
It may not die, but it does feel the pain.
An ancient, voracious specimen.
Seemingly lazy, but ever watchful.
A True sacrifice, despite all the blood.
A Fiercely loyal companion.
Nonthreatening, if you leave it be.
Interesting…
Unassuming, but determined Pest.
What an industrious creature.
A Minor, Meddlesome Terror.
A Friend Shaped Regenerator.
Regal, royal and mother of pests.
Always different, ever changing.
A venerable leader, emboldening others.
Canine, reptile, bird, amalgam is all.
